```json
{
  "contents": "\"use client\";\nimport \"animate.css\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from \"react-syntax-highlighter\";\nimport { oneLight } from \"react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism\";\n\ninterface Props { isActive: boolean }\n\nconst code = `function updateElement(current, element) {\n  if (current?.type === element.type) {\n    // ✅ 类型相同 → 复用 Fiber，更新 props\n    return useFiber(current, element.props);\n  }\n  // ❌ 类型不同 → 销毁旧 Fiber，创建新 Fiber\n  return createFiberFromElement(element);\n}`;\n\nexport function Step3TypeDiff({ isActive }: Props) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full gap-0\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-8 px-8 py-10 border-r border-border\">\n        <div className={cn(\"text-center\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n          <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 3 / 6</p>\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">类型不同 → 直接替换</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-sm text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n            节点类型（tag 名）改变时，React 不会尝试复用，直接卸载整棵旧子树，挂载新子树。\n          </p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex w-full max-w-xl flex-col gap-6\">\n          {/* 场景 A：类型相同 */}\n          <div className={cn(\n            \"rounded-xl border border-green-200 bg-green-50 p-4 dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-950\",\n            isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInLeft\" : \"opacity-0\"\n          )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.2s\" }}>\n            <p className=\"mb-2 text-xs font-semibold text-green-700 dark:text-green-400\">✅ 类型相同 — 复用</p>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4 font-mono text-sm\">\n              <span className=\"rounded border border-green-400 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-green-700\">&lt;div&gt;</span>\n              <span className=\"text-text-secondary\">→</span>\n              <span className=\"rounded border border-green-400 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-green-700\">&lt;div&gt;</span>\n              <span className=\"text-xs text-green-600\">仅更新 props，保留 DOM 节点</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 场景 B：类型不同 */}\n          <div className={cn(\n            \"rounded-xl border border-red-200 bg-red-50 p-4 dark:border-red-900 dark:bg-red-950\",\n            isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInLeft\" : \"opacity-0\"\n          )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.5s\" }}>\n            <p className=\"mb-2 text-xs font-semibold text-red-700 dark:text-red-400\">❌ 类型不同 — 销毁重建</p>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4 font-mono text-sm\">\n              <span className={cn(\n                \"rounded border border-red-400 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-red-600\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__flipOutX\" : \"\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.8s\" }}>&lt;div&gt;</span>\n              <span className=\"text-text-secondary\">→</span>\n              <span className={cn(\n                \"rounded border border-amber-400 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-amber-700\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__flipInX\" : \"\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"1.1s\" }}>&lt;span&gt;</span>\n              <span className=\"text-xs text-red-600\">整棵子树卸载 + 重新挂载</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 警告提示 */}\n          <div className={cn(\n            \"rounded-xl border border-border bg-background-secondary p-3 text-xs text-text-secondary\",\n            isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n          )} style={{ animationDelay: \"1.4s\" }}>\n            ⚠️ 因此，不要用条件渲染在同位置切换不同组件类型，会触发整棵子树的卸载（state 丢失、动画中断）。\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 代码面板 */}\n      <div className=\"w-72 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background-secondary p-5\">\n        <p className=\"mb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">核心源码</p>\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n          <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"javascript\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"11px\", background: \"transparent\" }}>\n            {code}\n          </SyntaxHighlighter>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

}
```

```json
{
  "contents": "\"use client\";\nimport \"animate.css\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from \"react-syntax-highlighter\";\nimport { oneLight } from \"react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism\";\n\ninterface Props { isActive: boolean }\n\nconst code = `// 无 key — React 按索引对比，全部更新\n<ul>\n  <li>Apple</li>  {/* index 0 */}\n  <li>Banana</li> {/* index 1 */}\n</ul>\n\n// 有 key — React 按 key 对比，精准复用\n<ul>\n  <li key=\"a\">Apple</li>\n  <li key=\"b\">Banana</li>\n</ul>\n\n// 新增 Orange 到头部\n// 无 key：全部节点更新（3 次 DOM 操作）\n// 有 key：仅插入 Orange（1 次 DOM 操作）`;\n\nconst items = [\n  { key: \"a\", label: \"🍎 Apple\" },\n  { key: \"b\", label: \"🍌 Banana\" },\n  { key: \"c\", label: \"🍊 Orange\" },\n] as const;\n\nexport function Step4Key({ isActive }: Props) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full gap-0\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-8 px-8 py-10 border-r border-border\">\n        <div className={cn(\"text-center\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n          <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 4 / 6</p>\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">key 的作用</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-sm text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n            key 帮助 React 识别同层列表中哪些节点是同一个，从而精准复用，避免不必要的 DOM 操作。\n          </p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex w-full max-w-xl gap-6\">\n          {/* 无 key */}\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <p className={cn(\n              \"mb-2 text-xs font-semibold text-red-600\",\n              isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n            )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.1s\" }}>❌ 无 key — 按索引</p>\n            <div className=\"space-y-1.5\">\n              {items.map((item, i) => (\n                <div\n                  key={item.key}\n                  className={cn(\n                    \"rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-red-700\",\n                    \"dark:border-red-900 dark:bg-red-950 dark:text-red-400\",\n                    isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInLeft\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                  )}\n                  style={{ animationDelay: `${0.2 + i * 0.15}s` }}\n                >\n                  <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary mr-2\">index={i}</span>\n                  {item.label}\n                </div>\n              ))}\n              <p className={cn(\n                \"text-[10px] text-red-500 mt-1\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.7s\" }}>\n                头部插入 → 3 个节点全部更新\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 有 key */}\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <p className={cn(\n              \"mb-2 text-xs font-semibold text-green-600\",\n              isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n            )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.1s\" }}>✅ 有 key — 精准匹配</p>\n            <div className=\"space-y-1.5\">\n              {/* 新增的 Orange */}\n              <div\n                className={cn(\n                  \"rounded-lg border border-amber-300 bg-amber-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-amber-700\",\n                  \"dark:border-amber-800 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-400\",\n                  isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__bounceIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                )}\n                style={{ animationDelay: \"0.9s\" }}\n              >\n                <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary mr-2\">key=&quot;c&quot; 🆕</span>\n                🍊 Orange\n              </div>\n              {/* 复用的 Apple & Banana */}\n              {items.slice(0, 2).map((item, i) => (\n                <div\n                  key={item.key}\n                  className={cn(\n                    \"rounded-lg border border-green-200 bg-green-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-green-700\",\n                    \"dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-950 dark:text-green-400\",\n                    isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInLeft\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                  )}\n                  style={{ animationDelay: `${0.3 + i * 0.15}s` }}\n                >\n                  <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary mr-2\">key=&quot;{item.key}&quot; ♻️</span>\n                  {item.label}\n                </div>\n              ))}\n              <p className={cn(\n                \"text-[10px] text-green-600 mt-1\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"1.1s\" }}>\n                头部插入 → 仅 Orange 新建，其余复用\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 代码面板 */}\n      <div className=\"w-72 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background-secondary p-5\">\n        <p className=\"mb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">核心源码</p>\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n          <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"jsx\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"11px\", background: \"transparent\" }}>\n            {code}\n          </SyntaxHighlighter>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 131
}
```

### 一处可关注的细节

```84:85:d:\geekiblog\.worktrees\knowledge\components\knowledge\demos\react-diff\step-4-key.tsx
"rounded-lg border border-amber-300 bg-amber-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-amber-700",
"dark:border-amber-800 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-400",
```

规格说 Orange 用「橙色」，实现用 `amber`（琥珀黄）而非纯 orange 色阶。视觉上属于橙黄色系，功能上无误，但若团队要求严格对齐 Tailwind 的 `orange-*` 色阶，可以考虑替换。这不影响功能正确性。
